_patch_meta.description: Combined VC patch for G1345 dikaiōma (mti_term_id 1099) under v3_5 — (a) updates group 1099-001 context_description under the characteristic-perspective model (§6.2 Step 3); (b) inserts 4 first-time verse_context rows for Heb 9:1, Heb 9:10, Rev 15:4, Rev 19:8; (c) promotes Rev 15:4 to anchor. Addresses partial-completion gap (6 of 10 verses were previously classified). Rom 5:16 retained as anchor. Two anchors post-apply (R4 satisfied).

set.context_description: Term names the dikaiōma — whether decree, standard, righteous act, or verdict — as the external reality that discloses, qualifies, or re-orients inner-being standing, moral orientation, and response (conformity, defiance, reception of verdict, or worship of divine righteousness revealed).
set.notes: Revised 2026-04-24 under wa-versecontext-instruction-v3_5-20260424 characteristic-perspective grouping model (§6.2 Step 3). Prior description covered Romans verses well but was narrow for Hebrews (external-contrast) and Revelation (worship-response, eschatological expression) verses added in this session. Group retained; 6 prior verses confirmed unchanged + 4 first-time inserts. Session B should evaluate whether the characteristic splits into sub-zones (Zones A–F noted in vc-139 obslog Entry 012).

operations.description: Group 1099-001 — revised context_description to characteristic-perspective form covering decree/standard/act/verdict register across the full 10-verse corpus.

record.notes: External cultic regulations of the first covenant; the term names the standard set up by Hebrews' wider argument as the external-only regulation contrasted with inner reality (9:14 perfecting the conscience). Inner-being engagement via implication (GR-PROG-007 branch b).

operations.description: Heb 9:1 — related, group 1099-001. First-time classification filling partial-completion gap.

record.notes: Explicit continuation of Heb 9:1 — names the dikaiōmata as 'for the body' and temporally limited, contrasting them with the inner reality of the new covenant. Filter pass via the inner/outer contrast argument.

operations.description: Heb 9:10 — related, group 1099-001. First-time classification filling partial-completion gap.

record.notes: Anchor for the worship-response / revelation-of-God's-righteous-acts face of the group. God's dikaiōmata revealed → all nations fear, glorify, worship. The verse stands alone; the inner-being worship response is explicit.

operations.description: Rev 15:4 — anchor, group 1099-001. First-time classification; new anchor designation.

record.notes: Saints' dikaiōmata as the Bride's fine linen — outward expression / visible adornment of inner righteousness at the eschatological consummation. Filter pass via branch b (term qualifies inner-being characteristic by naming its outward expression).

operations.description: Rev 19:8 — related, group 1099-001. First-time classification filling partial-completion gap.
